Reference

All functions

alpha_hull_clustering3D()

Find cell clusters in 3D spatial data using alpha hull clustering algorithm.

calculate_all_gradient_cc_metrics3D()

Apply all cell colocalization metrics (gradient version) on 3D spatial data.

calculate_all_single_radius_cc_metrics3D()

Apply all cell colocalization metrics on 3D spatial data.

calculate_border_of_clusters3D()

Algorithm to determine cells which form the border of cell clusters in 3D spatial data.

calculate_cell_proportion_grid_metrics3D()

Calculate cell proportion grid metrics in 3D spatial data.

calculate_cell_proportions3D()

Calculate cell proportions in 3D spatial data.

calculate_cell_proportions_of_clusters3D()

Calculate cell proportion of clusters in 3D spatial data.

calculate_cells_in_neighbourhood3D()

Calculate cells in neighbourhood on 3D spatial data.

calculate_cells_in_neighbourhood_gradient3D()

Calculate cells in neighbourhood gradient on 3D spatial data.

calculate_center_of_clusters3D()

Calculate the centre of clusters in 3D spatial data.

calculate_co_occurrence3D()

Calculate co-occurrence on 3D spatial data.

calculate_co_occurrence_gradient3D()

Calculate co-occurrence gradient on 3D spatial data.

calculate_cross_G3D()

Calculate cross G on 3D spatial data.

calculate_cross_G_gradient3D()

Calculate cross G gradient on 3D spatial data.

calculate_cross_K3D()

Calculate cross K-function on 3D spatial data.

calculate_cross_K_gradient3D()

Calculate cross K gradient on 3D spatial data.

calculate_cross_L3D()

Calculate cross L-function on 3D spatial data.

calculate_cross_L_gradient3D()

Calculate cross L gradient on 3D spatial data.

calculate_entropy_background3D()

Calculate the background entropy of 3D spatial data.

calculate_entropy_grid_metrics3D()

Calculate entropy grid metrics in 3D spatial data.

calculate_minimum_distances_between_cell_types3D()

Calculate minimum distances between cell types in 3D spatial data.

calculate_minimum_distances_to_clusters3D()

Calculate minimum distances to cell clusters in 3D spatial data.

calculate_mixing_scores3D()

Calculate mixing scores on 3D spatial data.

calculate_mixing_scores_gradient3D()

Calculate mixing scores gradient on 3D spatial data.

calculate_neighbourhood_counts3D()

Calculate neighbourhood counts on 3D spatial data.

calculate_neighbourhood_counts_gradient3D()

Calculate neighbourhood counts gradient on 3D spatial data.

calculate_neighbourhood_entropy3D()

Calculate neighbourhood entropy on 3D spatial data.

calculate_neighbourhood_entropy_gradient3D()

Calculate neighbourhood entropy gradient on 3D spatial data.

calculate_pairwise_distances_between_cell_types3D()

Calculate pairwise distances between cell types in 3D spatial data.

calculate_prevalence3D()

Calculate prevalence of 3D grid metrics.

calculate_prevalence_gradient3D()

Calculate prevalence gradient of 3D grid metrics.

calculate_spatial_autocorrelation3D()

Calculate spatial autocorrelation of 3D grid metrics.

calculate_volume_of_clusters3D()

Algorithm to determine the volume of cell clusters in 3D spatial data.

dbscan_clustering3D()

Find cell clusters in 3D spatial data using dbscan clustering algorithm.

get_spe_grid_metrics3D()

Calculate grid metrics in 3D spatial data.

grid_based_clustering3D()

Find cell clusters in 3D spatial data using grid based clustering algorithm.

plot_alpha_hull_clusters3D()

Function to plot alpha hull clusters in 3D spatial data.

plot_cells3D()

Function to plot cells in 3D spatial data.

plot_cells_in_neighbourhood_gradient3D()

Function to plot cells in neighbourhood gradient data.

plot_co_occurrence_gradient3D()

Function to plot co-occurrence gradient data.

plot_cross_G_gradient3D()

Function to plot cross G gradient data.

plot_cross_K_gradient3D()

Function to plot cross K gradient data.

plot_cross_L_gradient3D()

Function to plot cross L gradient data.

plot_distances_between_cell_types_violin3D()

Function to plot distances between cell types as a set of violin plots.

plot_grid_based_clusters3D()

Function to plot grid based clusters in 3D spatial data.

plot_grid_metrics_continuous3D()

Plot 3D grid metrics (continuous method).

plot_grid_metrics_discrete3D()

Plot 3D grid metrics (discrete method).

plot_mixing_scores_gradient3D()

Function to plot mixing scores gradient data.

plot_neighbourhood_counts_gradient3D()

Function to plot neighbourhood counts gradient data.

plot_neighbourhood_entropy_gradient3D()

Function to plot neighbourhood entropy gradient data.

summarise_distances_between_cell_types3D()

Summarise distances between cell types.

summarise_neighbourhood_metric3D()

Summarise neighbourhood metric data.
